# ARCA Server — LLM Context

## What is this project?
ARCA Server is a full-stack Argentine electronic invoicing system (facturación electrónica) that integrates with AFIP/ARCA web services. It allows businesses to issue invoices (Facturas A/B/C), credit notes, debit notes, query taxpayer data, and generate AFIP certificates — all through AFIP's official SOAP-based APIs.

## Architecture
- **Backend:** Express 5.2 (TypeScript 6), Prisma 7 (PostgreSQL, driver adapter @prisma/adapter-pg), Zod 4, @ramiidv/arca-sdk, arca-cert
- **Frontend:** React 19.2, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS 4 (@tailwindcss/vite, no postcss.config), React Hook Form 7
- **SDK:** @ramiidv/arca-sdk v1.2+ handles all AFIP SOAP communication (WSFE, WSFEX, WSAA, Padrón, CAEA, QR). Parameter caching built-in (clearParamCache() to invalidate)
- **Certificates:** arca-cert handles automated AFIP certificate generation/renewal via portal login

## Key Files

### Backend
- `backend/src/index.ts` — Express app with Helmet (CSP, HSTS, frame-ancestors:none), CORS, rate limiting (200/15min global, 20/15min auth), body limit 1MB
- `backend/src/config/index.ts` — Environment config. JWT_SECRET and DATABASE_URL are required (no defaults, throws on missing)
- `backend/src/services/arca.service.ts` — Arca SDK instance via Proxy pattern (allows hot-reload on cert change). Event logging for auth, requests, retries, errors. `reloadArca(production?)` recreates instance without server restart
- `backend/src/services/invoice.service.ts` — createInvoice (facturar), createNotaCredito, createNotaDebito, QR generation via Arca.generateQRUrl(), shared saveComprobante helper
- `backend/src/lib/prisma.ts` — Single shared Prisma 7 client with PrismaPg driver adapter
- `backend/src/middleware/auth.ts` — JWT Bearer + API key (SHA-256 hashed, looked up by hash). API keys authenticated via X-API-Key header
- `backend/src/middleware/errorHandler.ts` — Handles AppError, ArcaAuthError (503), ArcaWSFEError (400 with errors[]), ArcaSoapError (502 with parseSoapFault for clean messages), ArcaCertError (status mapped by code), ArcaError (400), PrismaErrors, ZodError
- `backend/src/routes/afip.ts` — 20 routes: AFIP params (8 incl. iva-conditions), cert management (4), contribuyente, comprobante, cotizacion, puntos-venta, last-voucher, status, tributo-types
- `backend/src/routes/invoices.ts` — POST / (create), POST /nota-credito, POST /nota-debito, GET / (list with filters: cbteTipo, clientId, from, to), GET /stats, GET /:id
- `backend/src/routes/auth.ts` — register (first user = admin), login (JWT), me, api-keys CRUD (max 5 per user, SHA-256 hashed, keyHint for display)
- `backend/src/routes/clients.ts` — CRUD with search by name/docNumber, delete protection (fails if client has invoices)
- `backend/prisma/schema.prisma` — User, ApiKey (key=hash, keyHint=mask), Client, Invoice (qrUrl, resultado A/R, monId, monCotiz), InvoiceItem
- `backend/prisma.config.ts` — Prisma 7 config (@ts-nocheck, executed by Prisma CLI not tsc)
- `backend/tests/arca-sdk.test.ts` — 48 vitest tests (unit + integration-ready)
- `backend/vitest.config.ts` — 60s test timeout

### Frontend
- `frontend/src/App.tsx` — 14 routes (2 public: login/register, 12 protected)
- `frontend/src/api/client.ts` — Axios client with 30s timeout, auto Bearer token, auto-logout on 401. 28 API functions including generateCert, renewCert, getCertInfo, testCert, consultarCuit, consultarComprobante, getCotizacion, all AFIP param getters
- `frontend/src/utils/errors.ts` — getApiErrorMessage() extracts err.response.data.error over axios err.message, appends soapFault if present
- `frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts` — formatCurrency (ARS), formatDate (YYYYMMDD → DD/MM/YYYY), formatCbteTipo, formatFullInvoiceNumber, formatDocType
- `frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx` — Sticky header with glassmorphism blur, skip-to-content link, user menu with avatar initial
- `frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx` — 5 sections: General, Facturación (Facturas, Nueva Factura, NC/ND), Gestión (Clientes, Nuevo Cliente), AFIP (Consultar Cbte., Parámetros), Sistema (API Keys, Configuración). AFIP status dot in footer
- `frontend/src/components/InvoiceStatusBadge.tsx` — badge-green (Aprobada), badge-red (Rechazada), badge-yellow (Pendiente)
- `frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` — Greeting by time of day, 4 stat cards (2-col mobile, 4-col desktop), AFIP status (hidden on mobile), recent invoices table (columns hidden on mobile), stats by type sidebar
- `frontend/src/pages/NewInvoice.tsx` — Type-aware form: Factura A (forces CUIT, shows alert), Factura B (all doc types), Factura C (hides IVA selector, no IVA in totals). Dynamic punto de venta from getPuntosVenta(). Service dates only shown for concepto 2/3
- `frontend/src/pages/NewNotaCredDeb.tsx` — NC/ND tabs, invoice search, type auto-inferred from original. Linked from InvoiceDetail with ?facturaId=
- `frontend/src/pages/NewClient.tsx` — CUIT lookup button (consultarCuit) auto-fills name, address, IVA condition from AFIP padrón A13
- `frontend/src/pages/ConsultaComprobante.tsx` — Query comprobante in AFIP by PV + type + number, shows full result with importes, CAE, dates
- `frontend/src/pages/AfipParams.tsx` — 6 tabs (comprobantes, documentos, iva, conceptos, monedas, tributos), lazy-loaded, monedas tab has cotización lookup
- `frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx` — Cert status (expiry, days left, color-coded), generate/renew tabs, verify cert against WSAA, AFIP server status, app info. Production as default environment
- `frontend/src/main.tsx` — Toaster with custom render: dismiss button (✕) on every toast, error toasts last 10s, success 5s
- `frontend/src/index.css` — @import "tailwindcss", @utility directives (btn-primary/secondary/danger, card, input, label, select, table-header/cell, stat-card, empty-state, badge-green/red/yellow, skip-link). Touch targets 44px for pointer:coarse, touch-manipulation, prefers-reduced-motion, focus-visible, print styles, custom scrollbar
- `frontend/src/types/index.ts` — Invoice (with qrUrl), Client, InvoiceItem, InvoiceStats, CBTE_TIPOS, DOC_TIPOS, IVA_ALICUOTAS, IVA_CONDITIONS constants

## AFIP Integration (via @ramiidv/arca-sdk)

The SDK wraps AFIP's SOAP web services:
- **WSAA** — Authentication (PKCS#7 signed TRA, token caching with dedup, 2min expiry margin, retry with backoff)
- **WSFE** — Electronic invoicing (CAE requests, parameter queries, CAEA support)
- **WSFEX** — Export invoicing (facturarExpo, countries, incoterms, currencies)
- **Padrón A5/A13** — Taxpayer data queries (consultarCuit, consultarCuitDetalle)
- **QR** — Official AFIP QR URL generation (Arca.generateQRUrl)

Key SDK methods used in this project:
- `arca.facturar(opts)` — Simplified invoice creation (auto-calculates IVA, totals, numbering)
- `arca.notaCredito(opts)` / `arca.notaDebito(opts)` — NC/ND with type inference from NOTA_CREDITO_MAP/NOTA_DEBITO_MAP
- `arca.consultarCuit(cuit)` — Taxpayer lookup (nombre, tipoPersona, estadoClave, domicilioFiscal, impuestos)
- `arca.consultarComprobante(tipo, pv, nro)` — Invoice query in AFIP
- `arca.getPuntosVenta()` — Active sales points
- `arca.getTiposComprobante/Documento/Iva/Concepto/Monedas/Tributo/Opcional()` — AFIP parameters (cached)
- `arca.getCondicionesIva()` — IVA conditions (RI, Exento, CF, Monotributista, etc.) (cached)
- `arca.getCotizacion(monedaId)` — Official exchange rates
- `arca.serverStatus()` / `arca.serverStatusExpo()` — AFIP server health
- `Arca.generateQRUrl(input)` — Official AFIP QR URL
- `Arca.formatDate(date)` — YYYYMMDD with America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires timezone
- `Arca.calcularTotales(items, opts)` — Preview IVA/totals (supports tipoC, tributos, exentos, no gravados)
- `Arca.extractCAE(result)` — Parse raw FECAESolicitar response

## Certificate Management (via arca-cert)

The arca-cert package automates AFIP certificate lifecycle:
- `createCertificate({cuit, password, alias, environment})` — Login to AFIP portal with clave fiscal, generate CSR, get signed cert from WSASS
- `renewCertificate({...})` — Creates new cert with timestamped alias suffix
- `getCertExpiry(certPem)` — Parse X.509 notBefore/notAfter dates
- `authenticate({cert, key, service, environment})` — Test cert against WSAA
- `parseSoapFault(body)` — Parse SOAP faults with contextual hints (e.g., "Estás usando el ambiente correcto?")
- Error handling: ArcaCertError with codes (INVALID_CUIT, LOGIN_FAILED, SESSION_EXPIRED, WSAA_ERROR, CERTIFICATE_ERROR, etc.) mapped to HTTP status codes in errorHandler

## Invoice Types and Rules
- **Factura A (tipo 1):** Responsable Inscripto → RI. Requires CUIT (DocTipo=80). Discriminates IVA.
- **Factura B (tipo 6):** RI → Consumidor Final/Mono/Exento. DocTipo optional (99=CF, 80=CUIT, 96=DNI, 86=CUIL). Discriminates IVA.
- **Factura C (tipo 11):** Monotributista → anyone. DocTipo optional. Does NOT discriminate IVA (isTipoC).
- **NC/ND (3,8,13 / 2,7,12):** Created from existing invoices via notaCredito/notaDebito. Type auto-inferred from original.
- **Service dates:** FchServDesde/FchServHasta/FchVtoPago only required when concepto = Servicios (2) or Productos y Servicios (3).

## Security
- Helmet with CSP (default-src 'self', img-src includes afip.gob.ar for QR), HSTS 1 year, referrer-policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, frame-ancestors 'none'
- API keys hashed with SHA-256 before storage (max 5 per user, keyHint field for display mask)
- JWT secret required (no default — server crashes on missing)
- DATABASE_URL required (no default)
- Rate limiting: 200 req/15min global (all endpoints), 20 req/15min auth-specific (/api/auth/*)
- CORS default: http://localhost:5173 (not wildcard)
- Body limit: 1MB
- SOAP fault parsing: parseSoapFault() from arca-cert provides human-readable errors with contextual hints
- ArcaCertError codes mapped to HTTP status: INVALID_CUIT→400, LOGIN_FAILED→401, SESSION_EXPIRED→401, PORTAL_ERROR→502, WSAA_ERROR→502, CERTIFICATE_ERROR→422, NETWORK_ERROR→502

## Database (Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL)
- Uses driver adapter (@prisma/adapter-pg) — no Rust engine, pure JS
- Generated client at `src/generated/prisma/` (gitignored, regenerated on npm install via postinstall script)
- Single shared instance via `src/lib/prisma.ts`
- Models:
  - **User**: email (unique), password (bcrypt 12 rounds), name, role (admin/user)
  - **ApiKey**: key (SHA-256 hash, unique, indexed), keyHint (first 12 + last 4 chars), userId, lastUsed
  - **Client**: name, docType, docNumber (indexed), ivaCondition, address, email, phone. Cannot delete if has invoices
  - **Invoice**: cbteTipo+puntoVenta+cbteNro (unique), all IMP fields as Decimal(15,2), cae, caeFchVto, resultado (A/R), qrUrl, monId, monCotiz as Decimal(15,6), observations
  - **InvoiceItem**: description, quantity Decimal(15,4), unitPrice Decimal(15,2), ivaId, ivaRate, subtotal, ivaAmount

## Testing
- 48 vitest tests covering:
  - SDK constants and enums (IVA_RATES, CbteTipo, Concepto, DocTipo, CondicionIva, Moneda, NOTA_CREDITO_MAP, NOTA_DEBITO_MAP)
  - Arca.formatDate() with timezone handling (accepts Date and string)
  - Arca.generateQRUrl() URL generation and uniqueness
  - Arca.calcularTotales() — IVA 21%, multiple aliquots, grouping, exentos, no gravados, mixed, tipoC, iva+exento validation, unknown IvaTipo, IVA 0%, tributos
  - Arca.extractCAE() — approved, rejected, array of FECAEDetResponse
  - Error classes — ArcaError, ArcaAuthError, ArcaWSFEError (structured errors[]), ArcaSoapError (statusCode)
  - Integration tests (auto-skip without certs): serverStatus, getTipos*, getMonedas, getPuntosVenta, ultimoComprobante, siguienteComprobante, facturar B, facturar C, servicios, notaCredito, consultarComprobante, consultarCuit, serverStatusExpo
